metadata.name: Assign Driver to a New Load

description: A dispatcher needs to assign a newly available load to the most suitable driver based on location, hours of service (HOS), and equipment type.

nodes.task_description: Review the details of a new load, including origin, destination, and required equipment (e.g., refrigerated trailer).

expected_outcome.expected: Dispatcher understands the requirements of the load.

nodes.task_description: Find available drivers who are near the load's origin, have sufficient available HOS, and have the correct equipment qualification.

expected_outcome.expected: System returns a list of 3 eligible drivers.

nodes.task_description: Assign the load to the best-fit driver and send them the dispatch information.

expected_outcome.expected: The load is assigned, and the driver receives all necessary pickup details.
